title: Updated Cost of Attendance
description: April 6, 2013To: NYU Shanghai Admitted StudentsFr: Jeffrey Lehman, Vice Chancellor of NYU ShanghaiWe are excited about the prospect of you joining the exceptional inaugural class at NYU Shanghai!
text:
Updated Cost of Attendance
Twitter
Facebook
Weibo
April 6, 2013
To: NYU Shanghai Admitted StudentsFr: Jeffrey Lehman, Vice Chancellor of NYU Shanghai
We are excited about the prospect of you joining the exceptional inaugural class at NYU Shanghai!
We have received a number of questions about financial aid awards. Please know that your offer of financial support was based on the information provided to us through the CSS/Financial Aid PROFILE. While the PROFILE application remains a good source of information about your financial need and allows us to award financial support equitably among students, we recognize that you may have unique circumstances that cannot be reflected fully on the PROFILE application.
We also wanted to share with you updated costs (Chinese students click here) for housing and meal plans. If you would like to attend NYU Shanghai, but after receiving your offer of financial support, finances remain a challenge, please email us at shanghai.financial.support@nyu.edu. You should include your name, your NYU ID number, and the reasons that you feel you are in need of increased financial support. We will re-review your PROFILE information in conjunction with your email. We may also request additional documentation to confirm your situation. If your situation warrants an increase in financial support, you will be notified via email. Please feel free to contact us with any questions or concerns that you may have.
We look forward to being an integral part of your success at NYU Shanghai!
Item Estimated CostTuition and Mandatory Fees 44,800 USD
Housing Rates 2013-2014 (ECNU International Student Hall) Annual Estimated CostDouble Room (Private Bath) $3000 USDDouble Room (Shared Bath) $2300 USDTriple Room (Shared Bath) $1600 USD
Meals (ECNU Cafeteria) Estimated CostPay as you go (estimated) $1500 USD
Housing Rates 2014-2017 (NYU Shanghai Pudong Residence Hall) Annual Estimated CostSingle Room (Private Bath) $5600 USDDouble Room (Private Bath) $3400 USDTriple Room (Private Bath) $2000 USD
Meals (NYU Shanghai Pudong Dining Hall) Estimated CostMeal Plan $2400 USD
*Financial aid awards will not be impacted by the decrease in housing rates.
